name: Verify Manager cannot change Manager role to Admin
description:
Invite member1 with Manager role. Invite member2 with Manager role.
Verify that:
    - Manager cannot change user role from Manager to Admin
descriptionHtml:
Invite member1 with Manager role. Invite member2 with Manager role.
Verify that:
- Manager cannot change user role from Manager to Admin

testStage.description:
Invite member1 with Manager role. Invite member2 with Manager role.
Verify that:
    - Manager cannot change user role from Manager to Admin
